name: Hired Blade Cowl
description: The Blades were a group of assassins operating in every major Aldorian city. They didn't last long though: betrayed by their client, most of them were found out, apprehended, and executed after a series of high-profile murders.
descriptionZh: “尖刀会”刺客和杀手的足迹曾经遍及奥尔多的各大城市，只是存在时间不长——一系列引人注目的杀人事件之后，这个组织因遭客户出卖，多数成员身份败露、被捕、处以死刑。
